description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the mono:4.4.0.182 Docker image and defines two stages: build and deploy. Add a compile job in the build stage that runs `nuget restore` followed by `MONO_IOMAP=case xbuild /t:Build /p:Configuration=\"Release\" /p:Platform=\"x64\" Compiler.sln`. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined, and there are no deploy jobs.
